text: Wore these for a family gathering and received compliments all evening. So light I forgot I had them on — the embroidery is gorgeous up close. Packaging was beautiful too.
The embroidered medallion is exquisite. It sits perfectly at the collarbone and paired wonderfully with a deep maroon saree. You can tell these are stitched by hand.
Stunning floral embroidery. The fabric clasp is clever — completely hidden. Only wish there was a larger size option, but the medium fits my wrist well.
This tikka transformed my festive look. Light enough to wear for hours, yet every stitch catches light differently. Worth every rupee.
Pinned one on my mother's dupatta for Diwali — the zari embroidery is so fine you need to look closely. A small piece with enormous character.
Used three in my braid for a family celebration. They looked like fresh jasmine from a distance! The jasmine scent option is subtle and lovely.
Beautiful craftsmanship. Took a week to arrive but the wait was justified. Lighter than expected which is actually a plus for long events.
Love the cotton wrap finish. My partner wears them daily — the pearls have a soft glow and the posts never irritate.
Stacked all three for a festive lunch. The embroidered texture catches light beautifully. Soft on the wrist — no metal digging in.
Bought this as a gift for my sister's birthday. The silk thread charm is so unique — she hasn't taken it off since.
Elegant and understated. The silk thread gives it a softness that rigid necklaces lack. Would love a matching earring set.
Such a graceful drape — everyone asks where I got it. The pearl stations are perfectly graduated and the cotton cord feels weightless.
